findingDetails.evidence: .opencode/install_guides/SET-UP - Code Graph.md exists on disk; %20 is standard URL encoding that markdown renderers decode. Checker treated %20 literally.
findingDetails.recommendation: Keep as-is; most renderers handle %20. Optionally replace with literal spaces for tooling compatibility.

findingDetails.evidence: INSTALL_GUIDE.md:369 — literal '<spec-folder>' placeholder in §12.4 runbook. Real spec folder exists at .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/003-memory-and-causal-runtime/003-embedder-testing-and-architecture/003-skill-advisor-stack/002-jina-swap-and-reindex/ but placeholder was never filled in.
findingDetails.recommendation: Replace with actual spec folder path or remove the sentence if the runbook is historical.

.opencode/skills/system-skill-advisor/mcp_server/lib/README.md exists. Same spurious 'skill_advisor/' middle directory.

freshness_contract.md:156. Target exists at .opencode/skills/system-skill-advisor/manual_testing_playbook/05--auto-update-daemon/. Same depth error.

findingDetails.recommendation: Create FORMAT.md in benchmarks/ describing the convention, or remove the link.

findingDetails.evidence: scripts/README.md:134. ../README.md resolves to benchmark-2026-05-20-rerank-ab/ which has no README.md (only benchmark_report.md, SOURCE.md, data files). The benchmarks root README is at ../../README.md.
findingDetails.recommendation: Either create a README.md in benchmark-2026-05-20-rerank-ab/ or change link to ../../README.md

findingDetails.evidence: enrichment/README.md:136. No code_graph/ directory under system-spec-kit/mcp_server/. Code graph functionality is now in separate system-code-graph skill. The enrichment module references it via dynamic imports that likely fail.
providers/README.md:173. No lib/contracts/ directory exists under mcp_server/lib/. Glob returns no matches.
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove link or create the missing contracts/README.md

findingDetails.evidence: plugin_bridges/README.md:72. skill_advisor was split out to separate system-skill-advisor skill. Its README lives at .opencode/skills/system-skill-advisor/mcp_server/README.md.
matrix/README.md:84. No skill-advisor/ under system-spec-kit/mcp_server/stress_test/. skill-advisor stress tests are in system-skill-advisor/mcp_server/stress_test/skill-advisor/.
search-quality/README.md:154. No code-graph/ under system-spec-kit stress_test. code-graph stress tests are at .opencode/skills/system-code-graph/mcp_server/stress_test/code-graph/README.md.

findingDetails.recommendation: Keep as-is; this is instructional example content, not a real link.

findingDetails.evidence: template_guide.md:864 — §8 Mistake 5 example block. Same pattern as plan.md.
template_guide.md:1060 — §10.2 'Integration with Parent Spec' example block. References non-existent parent spec.md.
template_guide.md:1084 — §10.2 example sub-folder README block. References non-existent directory under references/templates/.
template_guide.md:1085 — §10.2 example sub-folder README block. References non-existent directory under references/templates/.
resource-map/README.md:64. No file matching level_contract_optional_resource-map.md found under templates/ via glob.
findingDetails.recommendation: Either create the missing template file or remove the link.

findingDetails.evidence: broken-links/spec.md:64 — test fixture explicitly documents '003-missing/' as 'BROKEN: This folder does not exist'. It is an intentional broken link used to validate check-phase-links.sh.
findingDetails.recommendation: No fix needed; this is a test fixture for broken-link detection.

findingDetails.evidence: matrix/README.md:49 — backtick path 'Put skill-advisor package tests in `../../skill_advisor/tests/`.' Same broken path as link 12 but in backtick form, invisible to markdown-link regex. skill_advisor was split to system-skill-advisor; correct path is `../../tests/` within that skill.
findingDetails.recommendation: Change backtick path to reference system-skill-advisor/mcp_server/tests/ or use a markdown link.

summary: 21 flagged links: 9 WRONG_SLUG (target exists at a different path depth or in split-out skill), 5 REAL_BROKEN (target file/dir does not exist anywhere), 5 TEMPLATE_EXAMPLE (intentional placeholder in template guide), 2 FALSE_POSITIVE (URL-encoding artifact and intentional test fixture). No P0 runtime-breaking paths. One additional broken backtick path found that the regex missed. Systemic pattern: several links reference modules (skill_advisor, code_graph) that were split into separate skills but the cross-references under system-spec-kit were never updated.
